description.zh-Hans: 使用正弦波配合分形噪波扰动，生成大理石/脉纹纹理。
description.en: Generates marble/veined texture using sine wave with fractal noise perturbation.

triggers.zh-Hans: 大理石, 石材, 脉纹, 装饰纹理, 建筑
triggers.en: marble, stone, veined, decorative texture, architectural

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成大理石脉纹纹理，可用于建筑材质或装饰性背景。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a marble veined texture for architectural materials or decorative backgrounds.
